texto: As I empty my head, I feel wonderful and alive. Sometimes my creation is as beautiful as the feeling it produces, but most often it has to go through many changes before it is considered good enough for public consumption.
explicacao: Citação de Faye E. Robinson sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “As I empty my head, I feel wonderful and alive. Sometimes my creation is as beautiful as the feel…” articula reflexao, writer, empty em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e reflexao.
